examples: He was carried off on a stretcher.
The two ambulance attendants quickly put Plover on a stretcher and got him into the ambulance.
Toad may be brought back at any moment—on a stretcher, or between two policemen.
They brought her out gently, lowered her to the ground, and put her on a stretcher.
They put him on a stretcher, load him aboard and take off for a hospital.
